CVE-2010-4207.title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Flash component i ...
CVE-2010-4207.description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Flash component infrastructure in YUI 2.4.0 through 2.8.1, as used in Bugzilla, Moodle, and other products, allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via vectors related to charts/assets/charts.swf.

CVE-2010-4208.title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Flash component i ...
CVE-2010-4208.description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Flash component infrastructure in YUI 2.5.0 through 2.8.1, as used in Bugzilla, Moodle, and other products, allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via vectors related to uploader/assets/uploader.swf.

CVE-2010-4209.title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Flash component i ...
CVE-2010-4209.description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Flash component infrastructure in YUI 2.8.0 through 2.8.1, as used in Bugzilla 3.7.1 through 3.7.3 and 4.1, allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via vectors related to swfstore/swfstore.swf.
